about.title: About Us
about.description: A leading company in financial solutions, management consulting, and advanced technical services. We provide integrated financial solutions including investment management, financial planning, and banking consultancy. We also offer specialized management consulting in business development, project management, and digital transformation. Additionally, we provide advanced technical services including software development, cloud solutions, and data management systems.

privacy.intro: SANADXPERTS is committed to protecting your privacy and the security of your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and how we protect it when you interact with our website or services. Last updated: February 2026.
privacy.data_collection: We collect information you voluntarily provide through our contact and recruitment forms, including: your full name, email address, phone number, selected service, message content, and CV or cover letter. We also automatically collect limited technical data such as your IP address and browser type for security and operational purposes only.
privacy.use: Your data is used exclusively for: responding to your inquiries and requests, delivering the consulting services you have requested, reviewing job applications and notifying you of outcomes, and sending updates relevant to services you have requested. We will not use your information for commercial or marketing purposes without your explicit prior consent.
privacy.sharing: We do not sell or share your personal data with any third parties except in the following necessary circumstances: compliance with legal orders or judicial directives issued by competent authorities, or where required to deliver a service in collaboration with trusted partners who maintain equivalent data protection standards.
privacy.security: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your data from unauthorized access, loss, or disclosure. Data is stored on secured servers and is only accessible by authorized personnel on a need-to-know basis.
privacy.retention: We retain your data only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purpose for which it was collected. Contact form data is retained for a maximum of one year. Recruitment application data is retained for six months unless otherwise specified.
privacy.rights: You have the right at any time to: access the personal data we hold about you, request its correction or update, request its deletion in full or in part, or withdraw your consent to its processing. To exercise these rights, please contact us via the email address below.
privacy.cookies: Our website uses strictly necessary cookies to ensure the site functions properly and to improve your browsing experience. We do not use advertising or tracking cookies. You may adjust your browser settings at any time to refuse or delete cookies, though this may affect some site functionality.
privacy.contact_text: For any questions or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or your personal data, please contact us at:

terms.intro: Welcome to the SANADXPERTS website. By accessing or using this website or any of our services, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions in full. If you do not agree to these terms, please discontinue use of this website.
terms.services: SANADXPERTS provides specialized consulting services including management consulting, financial solutions, and technology solutions. Services are delivered under separate agreements with each client. Content published on this website is for general informational purposes only and does not constitute formal professional advice.
terms.acceptable_use: You agree to use this website for lawful purposes only. The following are strictly prohibited: attempting to gain unauthorized access to any part of the website or our systems, posting or transmitting harmful, misleading, or offensive content, using the website for unauthorized commercial purposes, and infringing upon the intellectual property rights of any party.
terms.ip: All content published on this website, including but not limited to text, images, logos, designs, and videos, is the exclusive property of SANADXPERTS and is protected under applicable intellectual property laws. No party may reproduce, distribute, or modify any of this content without prior written permission from SANADXPERTS.
terms.liability: SANADXPERTS shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of, or inability to use, this website or any information contained herein. The company does not guarantee uninterrupted access to the website or that it will be entirely free of technical errors.
terms.disclaimer: We make every effort to provide accurate and up-to-date information. However, we do not guarantee the completeness or accuracy of information at all times. Content on this website is intended for general informational purposes and is not a substitute for direct professional consultation.
terms.governing_law: These Terms & Conditions shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Iraq. In the event of any dispute arising out of or relating to these Terms or use of the website, the competent courts of the Republic of Iraq shall have exclusive jurisdiction to settle such disputes.
terms.changes: SANADXPERTS reserves the right to amend these Terms & Conditions at any time without prior notice. Your continued use of the website following the posting of amendments constitutes your acceptance of the revised terms. We recommend reviewing this page periodically to stay informed of any updates.
terms.contact_text: If you have any questions about these Terms & Conditions, we would be happy to hear from you at:
